semantic.role: Test suite for the output manager module. Provides a placeholder scaffold for future test development and a minimal smoke test to verify the test framework is operational.
responsibilities: Provide a scaffold for testing output manager behavior.
Run a basic smoke test to ensure the test framework is operational.
Serve as a placeholder for future output manager tests.
outOfScope: Production functionality: this file is exclusively for test purposes and does not export any production code.
Comprehensive coverage: currently only a placeholder with no meaningful assertions.
invariants: Must be run with Vitest test runner.
Must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts suffix (currently complies).
